github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat:
Format: '<prefix>: <short summary (Korean, max 60 chars)>

<detailed description (Korean)>'. Allowed prefixes: feat, fix, refactor, chore, docs, style, test, perf, ci, build. Summary MUST be in Korean. Use bullet points in body for multiple changes. Never create a one-line commit message. Prefer 'chore' if not a business feature/bug. Example: 'feat: 주문 내보내기 API 추가

- ERP 주문 목록 엔드포인트 추가
- 날짜 범위 필터링 적용'
